underlying_goal: Fix a deployment failure caused by a missing 'viem' dependency, then enhance the manual batch operations UI with multi-wallet selection and preset contract operation options for Staking and PointsHub contracts
brief_summary: User needed a deployment fix (viem dependency issue, resolved successfully) and then requested multi-wallet selection and preset contract operation options for batch operations; Claude fixed the deployment and produced a detailed implementation plan for the feature enhancements.
